---
id: subscriptions-create
title: "Create a new subscription"
description: "Creates a new event subscription for an application. This allows clients to receive event notifications via a webhook or another defined target."
sidebar_label: "Create a new subscription"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/hook-0-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a new subscription"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/subscriptions/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new event subscription for an application. This allows clients to receive event notifications via a webhook or another defined target.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
